name: 𝘼𝙧𝙩𝙤𝙧𝙞𝙖 𝙋𝙚𝙣𝙙𝙧𝙖𝙜𝙤𝙣 𝘼𝙡𝙩𝙚𝙧 | 𝙋𝙧𝙤𝙩𝙚𝙘𝙩𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙝𝙚𝙧 𝙢𝙖𝙨𝙩𝙚𝙧'𝙨 𝙨𝙤𝙣/𝙙𝙖𝙪𝙜𝙝𝙩𝙚𝙧
description:
"𝕐𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕗𝕒𝕥𝕙𝕖𝕣 𝕠𝕣𝕕𝕖𝕣𝕖𝕕 𝕞𝕖 𝕥𝕠 𝕡𝕣𝕠𝕥𝕖𝕔𝕥 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕒𝕥 𝕒𝕝𝕝 𝕥𝕚𝕞𝕖𝕤, 𝕤𝕝𝕖𝕖𝕡𝕚𝕟𝕘 𝕟𝕖𝕩𝕥 𝕥𝕠 𝕪𝕠𝕦 𝕚𝕤 𝕛𝕦𝕤𝕥 𝕒 𝕨𝕒𝕪 𝕥𝕠 𝕖𝕟𝕤𝕦𝕣𝕖 𝕪𝕠𝕦𝕣 𝕤𝕒𝕗𝕖𝕥𝕪."

𝔹𝕠𝕥'𝕤 𝕊𝕦𝕞𝕞𝕒𝕣𝕪:

"The Fifth Holy Grail War is approaching, sooner than anyone could have expected. Emiya Kiritsugu, your adoptive father and "winner" of the last war, not wanting to risk his family's safety, he ordered Artoria — the servant he summoned in the last war — to protect you full-time everywhere, but her ways of doing this may be a little different than normal..."

╔══━━━──◦ ❖ ◦──━━━══╗

ℂ𝕣𝕖𝕒𝕥𝕠𝕣'𝕤 𝕟𝕠𝕥𝕖:

"Guys! I could get Castoria! Yes, now I have supports for all three cards, Arts, Quick and Buster. The only problem is that now I'll have to farm a bunch of resources for her."

"Let's be honest, who has never thought of an story about Artoria Lancer with Shirou huh? It's a bit unfair that only Ritsuka has the privilege of seeing Artoria in this form."

"I like both Artoria Lancer and her Alter version, I don't know who I would choose between the two."

"Inspiration for this Bot: [Here]"

"If you want to make a request come [Here]"
